Vancouver Airport Terminal / Hangar

5911 Airport Road South
Richmond, BC V7B 1B5
Directions

Schedule or Charter Information: +1.800.665.4354
Administration: +1.604.273.4688

Vancouver Harbour Heliport

455 Waterfront Road West
Vancouver, BC V6B 5E8
*please note: pedestrian access via Waterfront Station requires Compass Card & does not open until after 8am on Sundays & Holidays
Directions

Schedule or Charter Information: +1.800.665.4354
Air Cargo & Heliport Information: +1.604.688.4646

Victoria Harbour Heliport

79 Dallas Road
Victoria, BC V8V 1A1
Directions

Schedule or Charter Information: +1.800.665.4354
Air Cargo & Heliport Information: +1.250.386.7676

Nanaimo Harbour Heliport

100 Port Drive (also known as Port Way)
Nanaimo, BC V9R 0C7
Directions

Schedule or Charter Information: +1.800.665.4354
After-hours parking access for vehicles registered at check-in : +1.250.268.2021

Sandspit Airport – Haida Gwaii / Hangar

85 Airport Road
Sandspit, BC V0T 1T0
Directions

Charter Information: +1.250.637.5344
Toll-Free: +1.877.569.4354

Prince Rupert – Seal Cove Aerodrome / Hangar

2595 Seal Cove Road
Prince Rupert, BC V8J 3P4
Directions

Charter Information: +1.250.624.2792
Toll-Free: +1.855.777.4354
